seoTitle: Bolwarrah vs Bona Vista — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bolwarrah and Bona Vista. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bolwarrah vs Bona Vista: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bolwarrah and Bona Vista.
heading: Bolwarrah vs Bona Vista — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bolwarrah, Victoria and Bona Vista, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bolwarrah has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Bona Vista (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bolwarrah or Bona Vista safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bolwarrah has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Bona Vista scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bolwarrah scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Bona Vista scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bolwarrah or Bona Vista?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bolwarrah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
